title: Korak 11

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
first_name = 'John'
last_name = 'Doe'
full_name = first_name + ' ' + last_name
address = '123 Main Street'
address += ', Apartment 4B'
employee_age = 28
employee_info = full_name + ' is ' + str(employee_age)
challengeFiles.seed:
first_name = 'John'
last_name = 'Doe'
full_name = first_name + ' ' + last_name
address = '123 Main Street'
address += ', Apartment 4B'
employee_age = 28
employee_info = full_name + ' is ' + str(employee_age)

tests.text: Trebalo bi da povežete ' years old' na kraj parametra employee_info.
tests.testString: ({ test: () => assert(runPython(`_Node(_code).find_variable("employee_info").is_equivalent("employee_info = full_name + ' is ' + str(employee_age) + ' years old'")`)) })

description:
Sada kompletiraj rečenicu ispravljanjem dodeljivanja vrednosti za employee_info i takođe spoji niz znakova years old na kraju. Zapamti da uključi razmak na početku svog niza znakova.

Konačno, objavi employee_info.
